title: granadilla capsularis
intro: Granadilla capsularis, also known as Passiflora incarnata or Passionflower, is a tropical plant native to the Americas and other parts of the world. It is a flowering plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The health benefits of Granadilla capsularis include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Granadilla capsularis include tea, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
